occupation: Group Sales and marketing director at The Dragon Group
headline: Founder of Route Media, Sportin Wales and Businessin Wales.
summary: Experienced leader, sales and marketing professional working strategically with businesses to achieve their revenue goals.

experiences.title: Group Sales and marketing director
experiences.description: Responsible for driving revenue via the sales and marketing teams in the The Dragon Group. The group consists of Dragon Signs, Route Media, Colour Studios Businessin Wales and Sportin Wales. We specialise in promoting and enhancing clients brands through innovative signage and advertising solutions.

experiences.title: Commerical Director
experiences.description:
Managing the commercial teams of Capital FM South Wales and Heart North & Mid Wales to deliver great creative commercial radio that generates results for clients across Wales and the U.K. 

Now also looking for new revenue streams to help CCUK achieve its ambitious goals.

experiences.title: Field Sales Manager
experiences.description: Managing the commercial team at Capital FM South Wales to deliver great creative commercial radio that generates results for clients across Wales and the U.K.

experiences.title: Managing Director and founder
experiences.description: As MD of Sportin Wales I oversea the running of the business with a focus on delivering the commerical revenue needed. I’m excited to see this challenger Sports Media brand grow and change the norm in Sports media.

experiences.title: Commercial Director
experiences.description: My role is to grow the Dragon signs business in new exciting sectors and areas. Working with the existing sales team we’re aiming to support even more clients with our exceptional products and service right across the UK.

experiences.title: Director and founder
experiences.description: Route Media are digital out of home specialists. We strive to combine the impact of above the line with the efficiency and effectiveness of digital. Advertisers value hitting the right market at the right time and that’s what we do.

experiences.title: Field Sales Manager Capital South Wales
experiences.description: Working with the Sales team of Capital FM South Wales to deliver great creative commercial radio that generates results for clients in the local market.

experiences.title: Key Account Director
experiences.description:
This role involved me dealing with the radio stations key clients such as Swalec, Wales Millenium Centre, Cardiff Airport and The National Trust.

I take of care of new projects and look for diffrent ways to generate revenue for the station while meeting my clients objectives.

experiences.title: Account Manager
experiences.description:
My first role in radio working for at the time the largest station in the country. 

This role was 90% new business and saw me build my personal advertising revenue from 0 to £500,000.

experiences.title: Assistant Resort Supervisor
experiences.description:
During this period I took on the role of 2wentys rep in Crete as well as assitant resort supervisor.
I also worked in Andorra and Austria as a ski consultant.

experiences.title: Assistant Team Manager
experiences.description: I worked my way up from telesales to the position of Assistant team leader and helped the team to consistently achieve their revenue goals.

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: Member of reel world radio academy 30 under 30 2015/16

recommendations:
Daniel Roche

I have worked with Dean closely for over 10 years. I have always had complete faith in his ideas and ability to get the best out of our marketing budget. He is a true professional. I couldnt recommend Dean enough.

Ian Christopher

Having worked with Dean on several projects, it's fair to say that he is innovative in his appraoch to marketing and providing communication solutions. His experience dealing with a multitude of different companies, in different sectors is refreshing and ultimately beneficial when looking at an overarching marketing strategy. Dean takes time to explain his thoughts on how a campaign could be successful, even if the tactics used may not sit within his field of work. He has great communication and sales skills, and will bend over backwards to satisfy the client and their requirements.

Daniel Roche

I have worked with Dean closely for over 10 years. I have always had complete faith in his ideas and ability to get the best out of our marketing budget. He is a true professional. I couldn’t recommend Dean enough.
